manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
Provide one single-word clue that relates to some of your team's words from the list below. You can choose to how many and to which words your clue relates to.
The goal is to have your partner guess all of your team's words based on the clues you give them, before the other team has uncovered all of theirs. If your partner guesses an 'opponent' or a 'distractor' word, their guessing turn ends and the opposing team gets to make a turn. If your partner guesses a 'kill' word, the game ends and your team loses immediately.
The more words your clue relates to, the quicker you can win the game, but the harder the associations may be to guess for your partner, so choose your clue word wisely. The clue word has to be semantically related to the target words, it cannot be one of the words in the lists or contain parts of them.

Always give your single-word clue and your comma-separated list of related target words in the following format and make your answers as short as possible, never include any other text than is required in this form:

CLUE: <WORD>
TARGETS: <TARGETS>

Your team words are: wool, suede, satin, nuclear, alcohol, club, fleece, machete, bomb.
Your opponent's team words are: quartz, glacier, scotland, island, peru, opal, cliff, ocean.
Distractor words are: wagon, century, hour, green, king, millisecond, suv.
The kill words are: carbon.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
Provide a comma-separated list of up to 4 words from the following list that best relate or are most closely associated with the word 'weapon'. Always start your list of guess(es) with 'GUESS: ' and do not include any other text in your answer.

satin, club, opal, suede, hour, wool, fleece, king, green, bomb, ocean, island, millisecond, glacier, century, alcohol, wagon, suv, carbon, cliff, quartz, nuclear, machete, peru, scotland

message.reasoning:
The user wants "Provide a comma-separated list of up to 4 words from the following list that best relate or are most closely associated with the word 'weapon'. Always start your list of guess(es) with 'GUESS: ' and do not include any other text in your answer."

The given list: satin, club, opal, suede, hour, wool, fleece, king, green, bomb, ocean, island, millisecond, glacier, century, alcohol, wagon, suv, carbon, cliff, quartz, nuclear, machete, peru, scotland

The user wants up to 4 words (so can be less). We need to identify which words from that list best relate to "weapon". The list includes items: club (a club is a weapon), bomb (explosive weapon), machete (a blade, a weapon), nuclear (nuclear weapons). Possibly "carbon" is used in making weapons? Not directly. "Suv" is a vehicle, not a weapon. "Wagon" is not a weapon. "Cliff" no. "King" is not a weapon. "Satin", "opal", "suede", "wool", "fleece", "hour", "green" are irrelevant. So from list we have: club, bomb, machete, nuclear. Also possibly "suv" could be used as a weapon (vehicle ramming), but not typical. So best matches: club, bomb, machete, nuclear. Up to 4; we can give all four. So answer should start with "GUESS: " then list: club, bomb, machete, nuclear (comma-separated). Ensure exactly "GUESS: " then words separated by commas and spaces.

Thus final answer: "GUESS: club, bomb, machete, nuclear".
